headline: Entergy Corp (NYSE:ETR) Shows High Technical Rating and Bullish Setup for Breakout
summary: Entergy Corp (ETR) stock shows a strong technical uptrend and a tight consolidation pattern, signaling a potential breakout entry for momentum investors.

headline: Entergy (ETR) Well Positioned With $2 Billion Capital Plan Increment
summary: Entergy Corp. (NYSE:ETR) is one of the 10 best regulated electric stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 4, KeyBanc increased the firm’s price target on Entergy Corp. (NYSE:ETR) from $102 to $111. The firm maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. KeyBanc noted that the company’s fourth-quarter results came in largely in […]
